stages.task: Score ready products by demand signals from REDDIT_PAIN_POINTS + ALPHA_STAGING
Map 5-6 communities per product niche using RESEARCH_SUBREDDITS + COMMUNITY_INTEL
Generate 3-day content sequence: problem→teaser→CTA using engagement_bait_converter
Post content per schedule, track engagement, adjust timing
